critical.mandate: Story must be in ready-for-dev status before starting
Follow TDD cycle: red, green, refactor

TDD phases MUST be executed as separate, sequential steps — NEVER combine them. Do NOT write implementation code during the Red phase. Do NOT skip the Refactor phase. Each phase must produce its own checkpoint and wait for user confirmation before the next phase begins.

Write an intermediate checkpoint to _gaia/_memory/checkpoints/dev-story-{story_key}.yaml after EACH TDD phase completes (Steps 6, 7, 8). Each checkpoint must include: workflow name, current step number, phase status (red_complete/green_complete/refactor_complete), key variables (story_key, epic_key, risk_level), output file path, and files_touched with sha256 checksums (shasum -a 256) for every file created or modified in that phase.
Definition of Done checklist MUST be written to the story file and every item verified before marking complete. The DoD gate (Step 10) is enforced — workflow HALTS if any item fails.
All tests must pass before marking complete

step.title: Load Story File
step.action: Read story .md file, parse YAML frontmatter
Extract: key, status, acceptance criteria, subtasks, dependencies
Resolve story file path: search {implementation_artifacts}/ for {story_key}-*.md. If no match, try {story_key}.md. Use the resolved path for all subsequent reads and writes.

step.title: Pre-Start Gate
step.action: Verify story status is 'ready-for-dev'
step.check: HALT: Story must be in ready-for-dev status
step.action: Read story frontmatter: extract risk_level field (default: low if absent)
Extract epic_key from story_key — e.g., if story_key is "E1-S1", epic_key is "E1" (everything before the last hyphen-and-story-number)
step.check: Search for ATDD file using BOTH patterns (epic-level first, then story-level): 1. Epic-level: {test_artifacts}/atdd-{epic_key}*.md (e.g., atdd-E1.md) 2. Story-level: {test_artifacts}/atdd-{story_key}*.md (e.g., atdd-E1-S1.md) If EITHER pattern matches a file, the gate PASSES — log which file was found. If NEITHER pattern matches: HALT — This story is marked high-risk. No ATDD file found (searched for atdd-{epic_key}*.md and atdd-{story_key}*.md). Run /gaia-atdd before implementation.

step.title: Check for WIP
step.action: Look for checkpoint file at _memory/checkpoints/dev-story-{story_key}.yaml
step.check: Validate checksums (shasum -a 256) for each entry in files_touched — flag DELETED or MODIFIED files, offer Proceed / Start fresh / Review before resuming
Offer to resume from last checkpoint or start fresh

step.title: Update Status
step.action: Set story status to 'in-progress' in story file frontmatter
Update sprint-status.yaml: set story to 'in-progress'

step.title: Plan Implementation
step.action: Load relevant sections from {planning_artifacts}/architecture.md — identify architectural components, patterns, and ADRs that apply to this story's scope
Load relevant sections from {planning_artifacts}/ux-design.md if available — identify UI components, interaction patterns, navigation flows, and accessibility requirements for this story
Break subtasks into implementation plan
Declare which files will be created/modified
step.ask: Here is the implementation plan with files to create/modify. Confirm to proceed, or request changes. [confirm / revise]

step.title: TDD Red Phase — Write Failing Tests

critical.mandate: RED PHASE ONLY: Write test files ONLY — do NOT write any implementation code in this step. Tests must define expected behavior and FAIL because the implementation does not exist yet.

step.action: For each subtask: write failing test(s) that define expected behavior (RED)
Run the test suite — verify all new tests FAIL
step.check: Tests should NOT pass yet — no implementation exists. If a test passes without implementation, it is vacuous and must be rewritten to actually test behavior.
step.action: Write intermediate checkpoint to _gaia/_memory/checkpoints/dev-story-{story_key}.yaml with: workflow: dev-story, step: 6, phase: red_complete, story_key, epic_key, risk_level, output_file: {story_key}-tdd-progress.md, files_touched (list every test file created with its sha256 checksum via shasum -a 256)
step.template-output: RED phase complete. Summary: test files created, test names, what each validates, confirmation all new tests fail. Include test runner output showing failures.
step.ask: Red phase complete — tests written and all failing as expected. Review test output above. [proceed to Green phase / revise tests]

step.title: TDD Green Phase — Implement to Pass

critical.mandate: GREEN PHASE: Write the MINIMUM implementation code needed to make failing tests pass. Do NOT write final/polished code — that is for the Refactor phase.

step.check: HALT: Red phase template-output must be saved before starting Green phase. Complete Step 6 first.
step.action: For each subtask: implement minimum code to make failing tests pass (GREEN)
Run the test suite — verify all tests PASS
step.check: HALT: All tests must pass before proceeding. Fix failing tests or implementation.
step.action: Mark each completed subtask in story file

Conditional checks — for each that applies: — If API boundary changes: write or update contract tests (consumer/provider) — If database schema changes: create reversible migration script (UP + DOWN) — If gradual rollout needed: implement feature flag wrapping new code path

Write intermediate checkpoint to _gaia/_memory/checkpoints/dev-story-{story_key}.yaml with: workflow: dev-story, step: 7, phase: green_complete, story_key, epic_key, risk_level, output_file: {story_key}-tdd-progress.md, files_touched (list every implementation file created/modified with its sha256 checksum via shasum -a 256)
step.template-output: GREEN phase complete. Summary: files created/modified, all tests passing, any contract tests or migrations created. Include test runner output showing all green.
step.ask: Green phase complete — all tests passing with minimal implementation. Review implementation above. [proceed to Refactor phase / revise implementation]

step.title: TDD Refactor Phase

critical.mandate: REFACTOR PHASE: Improve code quality, extract abstractions, decompose components, improve naming. Do NOT skip this step even if the Green phase code looks acceptable.

step.check: HALT: Green phase template-output must be saved before starting Refactor phase. Complete Step 7 first.
step.action: Refactor implementation while keeping all tests green: extract shared utilities, decompose large functions, improve naming, remove duplication
Run the test suite — verify all tests still PASS after refactoring
step.check: HALT: Refactoring broke tests. Revert or fix before proceeding.
step.action: Write intermediate checkpoint to _gaia/_memory/checkpoints/dev-story-{story_key}.yaml with: workflow: dev-story, step: 8, phase: refactor_complete, story_key, epic_key, risk_level, output_file: {story_key}-tdd-progress.md, files_touched (list ALL files created/modified across all 3 phases with sha256 checksums via shasum -a 256)
step.template-output: REFACTOR phase complete. Summary: what was refactored, why, confirmation all tests still pass. Include test runner output.
step.ask: Refactor phase complete — all tests still passing. Review refactored code. [proceed / continue refactoring]

step.title: Capture Findings
step.action: Review any out-of-scope issues discovered during implementation (e.g., missing setup scripts, environment gaps, tech debt, broken tooling)
For each finding: add a row to the Findings table in the story file with type, severity, finding description, and suggested action
If no findings were discovered, leave the Findings table empty

step.title: Definition of Done Verification
step.action: Write or update the "Definition of Done" section in the story file with the following checklist items. For each item, run the verification described and mark it [x] if it passes or [ ] if it fails:
- [ ] **Code compiles** — run the project build command (e.g., npm run build, mvn compile, flutter build). Mark [x] if exit code 0, [ ] if errors.
- [ ] **All tests pass** — run the full test suite. Mark [x] if all tests pass, [ ] if any fail.
- [ ] **All acceptance criteria met** — compare each AC from the story against the implementation. Mark [x] only if every AC is demonstrably satisfied.
- [ ] **No linting/formatting errors** — run the project linter (e.g., eslint, pylint, dart analyze). Mark [x] if no errors, [ ] if errors found.
- [ ] **Code follows project conventions** — verify naming, file structure, and patterns match existing codebase. Mark [x] if consistent.
- [ ] **No hardcoded secrets or credentials** — scan new/modified files for API keys, passwords, tokens, connection strings. Mark [x] if clean.
- [ ] **All subtasks marked complete** — verify every subtask in the story file is checked off. Mark [x] if all done.
- [ ] **Documentation updated** — if the change affects APIs, configs, or user-facing behavior, verify that relevant docs are updated. Mark [x] if not applicable or if docs are updated.
step.check: HALT: Definition of Done has unchecked items. List each failing item with the reason. Fix the issues before proceeding.
step.ask: Definition of Done checklist complete. Review the results above. All items must pass to proceed. [proceed / fix issues]

step.title: Load Skills JIT
step.action: Load git-workflow:commits section for commit conventions
Apply conventional commit format to all commits

step.title: Commit Changes
step.action: Stage all changes
Commit with conventional commit format: type(scope): description

step.title: Post-Complete Gate
step.action: Verify all tests pass (final confirmation)
Verify all acceptance criteria met
Verify all subtasks marked complete

Re-read the "Definition of Done" section from the story file — verify every item is checked (- [x]). Required items: code compiles, all tests pass, acceptance criteria met, no lint errors, project conventions followed, no hardcoded secrets, all subtasks complete, documentation updated.
step.check: HALT: All tests must pass before marking complete
HALT: All Definition of Done items must be checked before moving to review. Unchecked items: {list}. Return to Step 10 to resolve.

step.title: Update Status
step.action: Set story status to 'review' in story file
Update sprint-status.yaml: set story to 'review'
Append files changed list to story file

Initialize Review Gate section in story file: set all six rows (Code Review, QA Tests, Security Review, Test Automation, Test Review, Performance Review) to PENDING with report link "—". If Review Gate section already exists, reset all rows to PENDING.
step.template-output: Update story file with status change to 'review', list of files changed, and initialized Review Gate table (all 6 rows PENDING).
